coverage.apiScope: covered by tests/product-completion/api-scope.spec.ts; validates uniform 401/403 envelopes, child/class/attachment/report scope, and denied-write non-pollution
coverage.crud: covered by tests/product-completion/crud-archive.spec.ts; validates children, teachers, records, assignment archive/restore and forged archive field rejection
coverage.weeklyReport: covered by tests/product-completion/weekly-report.spec.ts and full-user-journey.spec.ts; validates generate/detail/archive/export/share and cross-role denial
coverage.feedbackAttachments: covered by tests/product-completion/feedback-attachments.spec.ts; validates feedback details, image/voice attachment metadata/content scope, limits, and unauthorized reads
coverage.vivoProvider: covered by tests/product-completion/vivo-provider.spec.ts and scripts/product-ai-smoke.mjs; local run verified missing-env contracts and no fake success because vivo env is not configured
coverage.ocrAsr: covered by tests/product-completion/ocr-asr-provider.spec.ts; validates OCR/ASR fallback, health material fallback, and provider_unavailable error structure
coverage.aiRoutesAuth: covered by tests/product-completion/ai-routes-auth.spec.ts; validates unauthenticated 401, role 403, child/class/institution scope, and parse access constraints
coverage.voiceOrb: covered by tests/product-completion/voice-orb-core.spec.ts, voice-director.spec.ts, voice-teacher.spec.ts, voice-parent.spec.ts plus E06-E09; validates fallback commands, confirmation, unknown commands, role denial, scope denial, and mobile orb visibility
coverage.browserUse: Browser Use runtime attempted but blocked by local Node v22.20.0 requiring >= v22.22.0; Playwright-equivalent full journey passed and captured E11 screenshots

checks.productSmoke: passed: npm run product:smoke (2 Playwright tests)
checks.productApi: passed: npm run product:api (8 Playwright tests)
checks.productAi: passed: npm run product:ai (missing-env provider smoke plus 5 Playwright tests)
checks.productVoice: passed: npm run product:voice (13 parser tests plus 20 Playwright tests)
checks.productJourney: passed: npm run product:journey (1 Playwright full journey test)
checks.featureSmoke: failed: npm run feature:smoke has 6 legacy D08 failures in communication-flow, director-summary, health-consultation, parent-storybook demoSeed, teacher-records persistence, and visual-only safety
checks.bugbashSmoke: failed: npm run bugbash:smoke / B26 found 6 parent console-error 403 issues while director/teacher routes remained nonblank

risks: Browser Use direct in-app runtime could not run because node_repl resolved C:\Program Files\nodejs\node.exe v22.20.0 and requires >= v22.22.0; E11 records Playwright journey as fallback evidence.
No real vivo env was configured locally, so E11 verified missing-env/fallback/no-fake-success contracts but did not perform a real provider call.
Brain backend was not running locally, so AI routes log expected proxy ECONNREFUSED/fallback noise while tests assert safe fallback behavior.
Existing feature:smoke D08 failures remain outside the new E11 product suites and should be stabilized separately if the release gate requires aggregate smoke green.
Existing bugbash:smoke B26 parent 403 console-error issues remain outside the new E11 product suites and should be triaged before a strict all-smoke release gate.
notes: E11 product API, AI, voice, smoke, and journey suites are implemented and passing. Overall status is partial because required aggregate feature:smoke and bugbash:smoke still fail existing legacy/B26 paths, and Browser Use direct runtime is blocked by the local Node version. E11 also fixed a service bug where PATCH /api/records could previously forge archive audit fields.
